description: Style Note Taking a traditional design and giving it a modern twist is what makes esprit watches timeless timepieces. Contemporary and trendy, this is an affordable timepiece with an exquisite design that highlights your individuality. Product Details Case style: Stainless steel rectangular case with crystal embellishments Dial style: Coral pink dial with silver hands Strap style: Dark Brown textured genuine leather strap with a tang clasp Features: Branding on the dial and screw to reset time Size Case diameter: 20 mm Case thickness: 5 mm
